title: aster spurius var. novae-angliae
intro: Aster spurius var. novae-angliae is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Aster spurius plant, which is native to North America. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers, and its medicinal properties include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Aster spurius var. novae-angliae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
